description: Enumeration of label formats supported by the arc-flash-labelling skill. Each maps format ID → applicable jurisdictions + standards layer + SVG template + signal-word panel style.

entries.label: ANSI Z535.4:2023 (US format)
entries.note: Z535.4 is text-driven + coloured signal-word panel. Most US installations use this.

entries.label: ISO 7010:2019 (international format)
entries.note: ISO 7010 is symbol-first; supplementary text optional. Common in EU + INT.

entries.label: BS 5499 (UK conventions, ISO 7010 base)
entries.note: BS 5499 adopts ISO 7010 + adds English signal words + HSG48 framing. Used in UK.

entries.label: RESTRICTED (DraftsMan extension for IE > 40 cal/cm²)
entries.note: Safety-critical override — supersedes jurisdiction defaults when IE > 40 cal/cm². Visual treatment intentionally distinct to signal that no standard PPE category applies.
